content:
gradient-shimmer adds animated multi-stop gradient text to React and Next.js interfaces.

Features:

• No CSS import or runtime dependency.

• Nine built-in gradient presets.

• Custom colors, band width, angle, and timing controls.

• Scroll, viewport, and reduced-motion pause behavior.

• Works well for status labels, hero copy, and background task feedback.
